title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google DeepMind demonstrated Science Skills, an agentic workbench that integrates over 30 scientific databases and orchestrates frontier models to accelerate research workflows from hypothesis to experiment design. The platform gives AI agents fluency in tools, models, and databases used by researchers.
